items.name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Three-color Y-shaped letter painted style 🎨
items.name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Three-color Y-shaped letter painted style 🎨
Double-sided mini tote. The pattern side uses high-quality custom rain-washed linen consistent with ZP 〽️, then coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both shiny and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and not prickly 💪 Plus with custom painting, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm and pouch 🎀➕gift box 🎁➕upgraded manual 💌
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
✈Goyard ♛ Card bag 🏷Essential for daily matching 💳
🔖G0YARD (Goyard) was founded in 1853 and has a history of over 160 years. The fabric is woven from a blend of linen, cotton, and hemp fibers, then coated with glossy shellac, making it waterproof, sturdy, and durable. Highly sought after by celebrities, royalty, and the aristocracy 🎉🎉
Uses exclusive wallet-matching custom glossy leather ✅Perfect diagonal stitching 🧵✅The yellow interior part is custom matching top-grain cowhide [⚠️Not PU leather ❌Not split leather ❌]

specs.rawTitle:
Authentic Grade
✈Goyard ♛ Card bag 🏷Essential for daily matching 💳
🔖G0YARD (Goyard) was founded in 1853 and has a history of over 160 years. The fabric is woven from a blend of linen, cotton, and hemp fibers, then coated with glossy shellac, making it waterproof, sturdy, and durable. Highly sought after by celebrities, royalty, and the aristocracy 🎉🎉
Uses exclusive wallet-matching custom glossy leather ✅Perfect diagonal stitching 🧵✅The yellow interior part is custom matching top-grain cowhide [⚠️Not PU leather ❌Not split leather ❌]

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
💖 🆕 Goyard Alto Round Box Bag is also a Hat Box Bag 🎩
Alto bag is a highly representative classic hat box bag that combines the essence of Goyard's box-making craftsmanship: Poplar wooden frame, round calfskin handle, closure buckle system, and iconic yellow lining. While appearing small, it has amazing capacity, can hold a mobile phone 📱 keys 🔑 lipstick 💄 small leather goods and other daily items.
The strap is adjustable and detachable, elegant for hand-carry, stylish for shoulder carry, super A and eye-catching 😍
Size: 18*16.5*7cm
🔍020216

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
💝🔔 New Upgrade🔔 Comes with bag charm clip 🎀➕ Gift box 🎁➕ Upgraded manual 💌
❤️Goyard (Goyard) has undergone multiple research and improvements, constantly upgrading the fabric and leather. Exclusive customization TM️ is only to constantly meet customers' high-quality requirements 🔝🔝
The base fabric uses high-quality custom rain-dyed hemp consistent with ZP 〽️, coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛🤘 Flexible and not prickly 💪🤓 Matching symmetrical patterns, pure colors with no color difference 😘 Check details in the pictures [Bow] [Bow]
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Coral Pink
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-dampened linen consistent with ZP, finished with a glossy resin coating [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and non-irritating 💪 Plus, with custom hand-painting, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm, card holder 🎀 ➕ gift box 🎁 ➕ upgraded manual 💌
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
Milk Tea Grey, Limited Sale
Reversible Anjou Double-sided Mini Tote. New color Milk Tea Grey. Features imported matching top-grain calfskin 🐂 ➕ custom Goyardine rain-dampened cotton-linen 😘 Exquisite, compact, and lightweight. The interior compartment is just the right size 👌. Reversible design. Includes coin purse and bag charm drawstring closure clip.
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
170th Anniversary Milk Tea Green, Limited Sale
When Saint Louis meets Anjou, the Anjou Mini Tote is born. The milk tea colorway features a linen and cotton blend for the outer surface ➕ imported matching top-grain calfskin. Exquisite and structured, it is also reversible. Includes coin purse, bag charm, and drawstring closure clip. Comes with a gift bag 🎁 A great choice for gifting or personal use.
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660-1

items.name_en: Goyard 💕 MORVAN Briefcase Lightweight, slim, practical, and elegantly designed, it is an ideal choice for both daily and professional use. It features a zip closure, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.
